turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle WHERE T2.ship_type  =  'Brig'

turns.text: How many people were killed or injured in each battle?

turns.query: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name, sum(T3.killed), sum(T3.injured) FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id

turns.text: Only show the ship id and name that caused the most total injuries.

turns.text: What are the names and ids of the different car makers?

turns.query: Select FullName, ID From CAR_MAKERS;

turns.text: What countries are they each from?

turns.query: Select Country, FullName, ID From CAR_MAKERS;

turns.text: Can actually just show the name, id and the number of models?

turns.text: What is the average horsepower of all cars?

turns.query: Select avg(horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA;

turns.text: How about the maximum?

turns.query: SELECT T2.horsepower FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What about the minimum?

turns.query: SELECT T2.horsepower FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.horsepower ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What is the model of the car with this horsepower?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.horsepower ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.query: SELECT avg(Weight) FROM CARS_DATA

turns.text: List all the car information with weights above this?

turns.text: How about below this?

turns.query: SELECT * FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Weight  <  (SELECT avg(Weight) FROM CARS_DATA)

turns.text: What are the ids, and models of the cars were made in 1970?

turns.text: Show their horsepower and MPG as well?

turns.text: What are their full names and ids?

turns.text: What models have they each produced?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model ,  T2.FullName, T2.id  FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id;

turns.text: Count how many modes there are per maker.

turns.query: SELECT Count(*) ,  T2.FullName ,  T2.id FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id GROUP BY T2.id;

turns.text: Show all the car ids with the make amc hornet sporabout (sw)?

turns.query: SELECT T1.ID FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Make  =  'amc hornet sportabout (sw)';

turns.text: What is its horsepower?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Horsepower FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Make  =  'amc hornet sportabout (sw)';

turns.text: How about its MPG?

turns.query: SELECT T1.MPG FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Make  =  'amc hornet sportabout (sw)';

turns.text: How about its accelerate?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Make  =  'amc hornet sportabout (sw)';

turns.text: Show all the different car makers?

turns.query: SELECT distinct Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS;

turns.text: What are the names of the countries they belong to?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Maker, T2.CountryName FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId;

turns.text: Show just the car makers from France!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId WHERE T2.CountryName  =  'france';

turns.text: How many are there?

turns.query: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.Country  =  T2.CountryId WHERE T2.CountryName  =  'france';

turns.text: How many car models are produced in total?

turns.query: SELECT count(*) FROM MODEL_LIST;

turns.text: How many in Germany?

turns.query: SELECT count(*) FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id JOIN COUNTRIES AS T3 ON T2.Country  =  T3.CountryId WHERE T3.CountryName  =  'Germany';

turns.text: How about in Japan?

turns.query: SELECT count(*) FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id JOIN COUNTRIES AS T3 ON T2.Country  =  T3.CountryId WHERE T3.CountryName  =  'japan';

turns.text: How about the USA?

turns.query: SELECT count(*) FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id JOIN COUNTRIES AS T3 ON T2.Country  =  T3.CountryId WHERE T3.CountryName  =  'usa';

turns.text: What is all the car information for cars produced in 1974?

turns.query: SELECT * FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  =  1974;

turns.text: Now, show me just the weight and cylinders of these cars.

turns.query: SELECT Weight, Cylinders FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  =  1974;

turns.text: List just those with 8 cylinders!

turns.query: SELECT Weight, Cylinders FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  =  8 AND YEAR  =  1974;

turns.text: What is the smallest weight?

turns.query: SELECT Weight FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  =  8 AND YEAR  =  1974 ORDER BY Weight ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What are all the different country names?

turns.query: Select CountryName FROM COUNTRIES;

turns.text: Which ones have no car makers?

turns.query: Select CountryName FROM COUNTRIES where CountryID not in (Select Country from CAR_MAKERS);

turns.text: Which ones have at least one?

turns.query: SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.CountryId HAVING count(*)  >=  1;

turns.text: Also provide the country id!

turns.query: SELECT T1.CountryName ,  T1.CountryId FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.CountryId HAVING count(*)  >=  1;

turns.text: Show all the car makers and their country name?

turns.query: SELECT T3.Maker, T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent  =  T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId  =  T3.Country;

turns.text: Count how many there are per country name?

turns.query: SELECT T1.CountryName, count(*) FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent  =  T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId  =  T3.Country GROUP BY T1.CountryName;

turns.text: Show just those from countries in the continent Europe.

turns.query: SELECT T1.CountryName, count(*) FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent  =  T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId  =  T3.Country WHERE T2.Continent  =  'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName;

turns.text: List the country names of those with at least 3 manufacturers!

turns.query: SELECT T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CONTINENTS AS T2 ON T1.Continent  =  T2.ContId JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T1.CountryId  =  T3.Country WHERE T2.Continent  =  'europe' GROUP BY T1.CountryName HAVING count(*)  >=  3;

turns.text: What is the horsepower, make for each car!

turns.query: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id;

turns.text: Show those with 8 cylinders!

turns.query: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.cylinders  =  8;

turns.text: How about 3?

turns.query: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.cylinders  =  3;

turns.text: Show the one with the maximum horsepower.

turns.query: SELECT T2.horsepower ,  T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.cylinders  =  3 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What is id of the car with the max horsepower?

turns.query: SELECT id FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: How about with the max MPG?

turns.query: SELECT id FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY mpg DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Show its make!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Make FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.mpg DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Now show its model!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id ORDER BY T2.mpg DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What is the average edispl of all cars?

turns.query: SELECT avg(edispl) FROM CARS_DATA;

turns.text: Can you show the average per car make?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Make, avg(T2.edispl) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id group by T1.Make;

turns.text: How about per car model?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model, avg(T2.edispl) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id group by T1.Model;

turns.text: Show the average for the model volvo!

turns.query: SELECT avg(T2.edispl) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T1.Model  =  'volvo';

turns.text: What are all the different models for each car?

turns.query: SELECT distinct Model from CAR_NAMES;

turns.text: What are the makes for each?

turns.query: SELECT Model, Make FROM CAR_NAMES;

turns.text: How many makes are there for each?

turns.query: SELECT Model, count(*) FROM CAR_NAMES GROUP BY Model;

turns.text: What is the model name with the most makes?

turns.query: SELECT Model FROM CAR_NAMES GROUP BY Model ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Show the full names of all the different car makers?

turns.query: SELECT FullName FROM CAR_MAKERS;

turns.text: Also include the car models produced by each!

turns.query: SELECT T1.FullName, T2.Model FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker;

turns.text: Show me just those produced by the maker with full name American Motor Company!

turns.query: SELECT T1.FullName, T2.Model FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker WHERE T1.FullName  =  'American Motor Company';

turns.text: How many are there?

turns.query: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker WHERE T1.FullName  =  'American Motor Company';

turns.text: What is all the information for the makers that have designed at least 1 car model!

turns.query: SELECT * FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker;

turns.text: Which ones have designed more than 1?

turns.query: SELECT * FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  1;

turns.text: How about more than 3?

turns.query: SELECT * FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  3;

turns.text: List just the full name and id!

turns.query: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  3;

turns.text: How many different models has maker with full name General Motors produced?

turns.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T2.Model) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T2.Maker  =  T3.Id WHERE T3.FullName  =  'General Motors';

turns.text: How many different models weigh over 3500 pounds?

turns.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T2.Model) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T1.MakeId  =  T3.Id WHERE T3.weight > 3500;

turns.text: How many models have either of these features?

turns.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT T2.Model) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T2.Maker  =  T3.Id JOIN CARS_DATA AS T4 ON T1.MakeId  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.FullName  =  'General Motors' OR T4.weight  >  3500;

turns.text: Show me the distinct list of their model names!

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T3 ON T2.Maker  =  T3.Id JOIN CARS_DATA AS T4 ON T1.MakeId  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.FullName  =  'General Motors' OR T4.weight  >  3500;

turns.text: Show the years and weight of all the cars!

turns.query: SELECT Year, weight FROM CARS_DATA;

turns.text: Show distinct years that the cars that weigh more than 3000 were produced!

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT Year FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 WHERE Weight  >  3000;

turns.text: How about the different years for those that weight less than 4000.

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT Year FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 WHERE Weight  <  4000;

turns.text: What are the distinct years, for the cars that are both?

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT Year FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Weight  >  3000 AND Weight  <  4000;

turns.text: What is the lowest accelerate for any car?

turns.query: SELECT accelerate FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY accelerate ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: How about the highest?

turns.query: SELECT accelerate FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What is the ID, Make and Model of this car?

turns.query: SELECT T1.ID, T2.Make, T2.Model FROM CARS_DATA as T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES as T2 ON T1.ID = T2.MakeID ORDER BY T1.accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Show just its horsepower.

turns.query: SELECT horsepower FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Show all the car information for any car of the model volvo!

turns.query: SELECT * FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Model  =  'volvo';

turns.text: What is the car with the least accelerate?

turns.query: SELECT * FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Model  =  'volvo' ORDER BY T1.accelerate ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What is its horsepower?

turns.query: SELECT T1.horsepower FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Model  =  'volvo' ORDER BY T1.accelerate ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What about its number of cylinders?

turns.query: SELECT T1.cylinders FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T2.Model  =  'volvo' ORDER BY T1.accelerate ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What is largest horsepower of all cars?

turns.query: SELECT horsepower FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: What is the accelerate of the car with this horsepower?

turns.query: SELECT Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: What are the car ids of the cars with a greater accelerate than this?

turns.query: SELECT id FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Accelerate  >  ( SELECT Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1 );

turns.text: How many are there?

turns.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Accelerate  >  ( SELECT Accelerate FROM CARS_DATA ORDER BY Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1 );

turns.text: What are the names of the countries that have no car makers?

turns.query: SELECT CountryName FROM COUNTRIES where CountryId not in (SELECT T1.CountryId FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country);

turns.text: Show me all the names of all the different countries outside of those!

turns.query: SELECT distinct T1.CountryName FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country;

turns.text: How many of these have more than 1 car maker?

turns.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T1.CountryId ,  COUNT(*) FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.CountryId HAVING count(*)  >  1 );

turns.text: How about more than 2?

turns.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT T1.CountryId ,  COUNT(*) FROM COUNTRIES AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.CountryId HAVING count(*)  >  2 );

turns.text: Show all models and horsepowers of all cars!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model, T2.horsepower FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id;

turns.text: Now show just the ones with 4 cylinders.

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model, T2.horsepower FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4;

turns.text: What is the model of that with the lowest horsepower?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower ASC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: How about the greatest horsepower?

turns.query: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: What is the lowest horsepower of all cars?

turns.query: SELECT min(Horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA;

turns.text: Show all the ids and makes of those with a horsepower greater than this!

turns.query: SELECT T2.MakeId ,  T2.Make FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T1.Horsepower  >  (SELECT min(Horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA);

turns.text: Which ones have 5 cylinders or less?

turns.query: SELECT T2.MakeId ,  T2.Make FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T1.Horsepower  >  (SELECT min(Horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA) AND T1.Cylinders  <= 5;

turns.text: How about 3 or less?

turns.query: SELECT T2.MakeId ,  T2.Make FROM CARS_DATA AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.MakeId WHERE T1.Horsepower  >  (SELECT min(Horsepower) FROM CARS_DATA) AND T1.Cylinders  <= 3;

turns.text: Show me the mpg, horsepower and accelerate for all the cars that were produced before 1980!

turns.query: SELECT mpg, horsepower, accelerate FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  <  1980;

turns.text: Also include the cars that have 8 cylinders!

turns.query: SELECT mpg, horsepower, accelerate FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  =  8 OR YEAR  <  1980;

turns.text: What is the max horsepower for this group?

turns.query: SELECT accelerate FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  =  8 OR YEAR  <  1980 ORDER BY accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: how about the max mpg?

turns.query: SELECT mpg FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  =  8 OR YEAR  <  1980 ORDER BY mpg DESC LIMIT 1;

turns.text: Show all the models that were built by the Ford Motor Company.

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id where T2.FullName = 'Ford Motor Company';

turns.text: What are all the models except those!

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker  =  T2.Id where T2.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company';

turns.text: Also provide the weights for all different makes for each of these models.

turns.query: SELECT T1.model, T2.Make, T3.weight FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.Id JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T4 ON T1.Maker  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.weight  <  3500 AND T4.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company'

turns.text: List all the different models from these that have makes that are lighter than 3500!

turns.query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T2 ON T1.Model  =  T2.Model JOIN CARS_DATA AS T3 ON T2.MakeId  =  T3.Id JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T4 ON T1.Maker  =  T4.Id WHERE T3.weight  <  3500 AND T4.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company';

turns.text: What are all the names of countries?

turns.query: SELECT CountryName FROM countries;

turns.text: Which ones have at least one car maker?

turns.query: SELECT distinct T1.CountryName FROM countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.countryId  =  T2.Country;

turns.text: Show me all of car names other than these!

turns.query: SELECT CountryName FROM countries EXCEPT SELECT T1.CountryName FROM countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.countryId  =  T2.Country;

turns.text: Show all the car maker id, names, the models and makes they produce!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker, T2.Model FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker;

turns.text: How many model does each car maker produce? List the id and maker!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker, count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id;

turns.text: Show me those that produce at least 2!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >=  2;

turns.text: For each of these, only show those that have more than 3 car makes!

turns.query: SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >=  2 INTERSECT SELECT T1.Id ,  T1.Maker FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker JOIN CAR_NAMES AS T3 ON T2.model  =  T3.model GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING count(*)  >  3;

turns.text: How many matches are there?

turns.query: SELECT count(*) FROM matches

turns.text: What was the maximum length in minutes for the matches?

turns.query: SELECT max(minutes) FROM matches

turns.text: Average?

turns.query: SELECT avg(minutes) FROM matches

turns.text: Most number of tours?

turns.query: SELECT T2.tours FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id ORDER BY T2.tours DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Give the first name and country code instead.

turns.query: SELECT T1.country_code ,  T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id ORDER BY T2.tours DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Find the surface that has the most number.

turns.query: SELECT surface FROM matches GROUP BY surface ORDER  BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: What about the year?

turns.query: SELECT YEAR FROM matches GROUP BY YEAR ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Find the name of the loser who lost the most times.

turns.query: SELECT loser_name FROM matches GROUP BY loser_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Give the rank points as well.

turns.query: SELECT loser_name, loser_rank_points FROM matches GROUP BY loser_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Give the same, but for the winner who won the most times.

turns.query: SELECT winner_name ,  winner_rank_points FROM matches GROUP BY winner_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Give the name of the loser who has the highest rank points.

turns.query: SELECT loser_name FROM matches ORDER BY loser_rank_points DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Do the same but for the Australian Open tourney.

turns.query: SELECT loser_name FROM matches WHERE tourney_name = 'Australian Open' ORDER BY loser_rank_points DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Give the winner name instead.

turns.query: SELECT winner_name FROM matches WHERE tourney_name  =  'Australian Open' ORDER BY winner_rank_points DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Give the length of the match in minutes of the shortest match.

turns.query: SELECT minutes FROM matches ORDER BY minutes ASC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Longest match?

turns.query: SELECT minutes FROM matches ORDER BY minutes DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Give the winner and loser name instead.

turns.query: SELECT winner_name ,  loser_name FROM matches ORDER BY minutes DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Find the birth dates of each of the players.

turns.query: SELECT birth_date FROM players

turns.text: Find tours and first name instead.

turns.query: SELECT T2.tours, T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.first_name

turns.text: Give the average ranking instead of the tours.

turns.query: SELECT avg(ranking) ,  T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.first_name

turns.text: Give the number of tours for each player.

turns.query: SELECT tours FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.first_name

turns.text: Give the average rank points and first name.

turns.query: SELECT avg(ranking) ,  T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.first_name

turns.text: Find the total ranking points instead.

turns.query: SELECT sum(ranking_points) ,  T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN rankings AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.first_name

turns.text: Find the number of players for each country.

turns.query: SELECT count(*), country_code FROM players GROUP BY country_code

turns.query: SELECT count(*), country_code FROM players GROUP BY country_code HAVING count(*) > 50

turns.text: Give the country code only.
